data.title: VanEck seeks approval for JitoSOL ETF, the first US fund based on Solana staking token, showcasing SEC's view on staking.
data.description: VanEck has submitted a proposal to introduce the initial US exchange-traded fund supported by a liquid staking token called JitoSOL. This move will examine the SEC's changing viewpoint on staking.

data.title: Cosmos (ATOM) price expected to hit $5.20 in 2 weeks amid bullish trend, surpassing key resistance levels.

data.title: Zoom reported Q2 revenue of $1.22 billion, beating estimates and raised FY26 guidance. Analysts praise its innovation.
data.description: Zoom Communications Inc. (NASDAQ: ZM) announced their second-quarter financial results which surpassed expectations and led to an increase in their FY26 guidance. The company reported revenue of $1.22 billion for the quarter, outperforming the projected $1.20 billion. Their adjusted earnings for the period were $1.53 per share, surpassing analyst expectations of $1.37 per share as per Benzinga Pro. Eric Yuan, Zoom's CEO, emphasized the impact of AI on revolutionizing collaboration, with Zoom pioneering innovation to enhance productivity, cut costs, and enhance customer and employee experiences. Zoom predicts third-quarter revenue to fall within the range of $1.21 billion to $1.215 billion.

data.title: Top analysts predict Nvidia to rally more than 22%. Analysts raise targets for aTyr Pharma to $17, C.H. Robinson to $136, and Walmart to $114.
data.description: Prominent analysts on Wall Street have revised their forecasts for several notable companies. Jefferies raised aTyr Pharma, Inc. (NASDAQ: ATYR) price target significantly from $9 to $17, with analyst Roger Song maintaining a Buy rating for the stock. The closing price for aTyr Pharma shares was $4.95. Meanwhile, B of A Securities increased the price target for C.H. Robinson Worldwide, Inc. (NASDAQ: CHRW) from $120 to $136, with analyst Ken Hoexter upholding a Buy rating. The closing price for C.H. Robinson shares stood at $122.80. Additionally, Goldman Sachs raised Walmart Inc. (NYSE: WMT) price target from $101 to $114, with analyst Kate McShane maintaining a Buy rating. Walmart's closing price was $97.96. For more details and comprehensive analyst rating changes, interested individuals can refer to the analyst ratings page on a financial news platform.

data.title: AI and Retro Biosciences revamped stem cell proteins with a custom model, potentially leading to new longevity treatments.
data.description: OpenAI and Retro Biosciences have collaborated to develop a unique AI model that was utilized to enhance the design of stem cell proteins. This partnership has successfully increased efficiency in this process. The advancements suggest the potential for the development of new therapies aimed at longevity. The collaboration demonstrates the power of AI in revolutionizing scientific research.

data.title: Bitcoin Cash aims to surpass $650 in 30 days, with resistance at $634. Mixed signals but bullish bias persists.
data.description: The price prediction for BCH aims for the range of $650 to $680 in the next 30 days, as Bitcoin Cash is currently challenging a crucial resistance level at $634. According to technical analysis, there are conflicting signals, yet an overall bullish sentiment persists.

data.title: Cincinnati Financial Corp (Nasdaq: CINF) declares 87 cents/share quarterly cash dividend, payable Oct 15, 2025.
data.description: Today, in Cincinnati, the board of directors of Cincinnati Financial Corporation (Nasdaq: CINF) declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of 87 cents per share during their meeting. This dividend is scheduled to be paid on October 15, 2025, to shareholders of record.

data.title: Lord Swraj Paul passed away on Aug. 22, 2025, known for his contributions as an industrialist, philanthropist, and parliamentarian.
data.description: In Chesterfield, Missouri on August 22, 2025, it is with great sorrow that we share the news of the demise of The Rt. Hon. Lord Swraj Paul. He was a well-respected figure in industrial, philanthropic, and parliamentary circles, leaving a lasting impact on numerous people worldwide. Lord Paul's legacy will be cherished by countless individuals globally.

data.title: Pender Growth Fund (TSXV: PTF) reports financial & operational results for three & six months ending June 30, 2025.
data.description: On August 22, 2025, in Vancouver, British Columbia, Pender Growth Fund Inc. (stock symbol: PTF) disclosed its financial and operational performance for the three and six months concluding on June 30, 2025.

data.title: Judge approves $13M BlockFi settlement after objection dropped, clearing the path for class-action resolution.
data.description: A recent development in the BlockFi case saw a significant move forward as a key investor withdrew an objection originally filed in February. This decision by the investor appears to have paved the way for the progression of a class-action lawsuit settlement. The judge overseeing the case acknowledged this development, indicating a positive step towards resolving the legal dispute. This withdrawal comes after a period of contentious legal wrangling, with the settlement now poised for further advancement. The settlement, which involves a sizable sum in damages, looks to be steadily moving towards a resolution following this latest development.

data.title: Meta stock rebounds with gains after a down week, fueled by Google AI Cloud Deal, amid debate on AI bubble.
data.description: The Meta stock experienced a recovery on Friday, posting gains after a week of declines. The market had been facing uncertainties surrounding the potential AI bubble. The rebound was linked to a recent deal between Meta and Google in the AI cloud sector, along with comments made by the Federal Reserve Chair. These factors contributed to Meta's positive performance, following a challenging period. The details of the agreement and the remarks from the Fed Chair influenced investors' confidence, leading to an upward movement in Meta's stock value amidst market fluctuations.

data.title: Price of LINK expected to reach $30.50 by Sept 2025 as it tests Fibonacci level, with resistance at $27.87. Bullish forecast, $30.50 in 3-4 weeks.
data.description: The latest analysis on LINK price anticipates a positive trend, highlighting a current resistance level at $27.87. The Chainlink forecast indicates a potential rise to $30.50 in the next 3-4 weeks, subject to the maintenance of crucial support levels.

data.title: Prospect Capital (NASDAQ: PSEC) schedules fiscal year earnings release for June 30, 2024, on Aug 26, 2025.
data.description: On August 22, 2025, Prospect Capital Corporation (NASDAQ: PSEC) revealed its plan to submit its Form 10-K report to the Securities and Exchange Commission showcasing the fiscal year outcomes until June 30, 2024. The company aims to release its earnings report after market closure on Tuesday, August 26, 2025.

data.title: Tevogen Bio Holdings Inc. recognized in BINJE’s BEST Health Care 2025 for advancing health equity and sustainable biopharma.
data.description: On August 22, 2025, Tevogen Bio Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: TVGN) of Warren, N.J. was recognized by BINJE's BEST Health Care 2025 for its prominent presence in the health sector. The media outlet showcased the Company's Founder and CEO, Ryan Saadi, MD, MPH, applauding his dedication to health equity and advancements in sustainable biopharmaceuticals. This acknowledgment underscores Tevogen's significance and leadership in the industry.

data.title: AVAX projected to reach $32 by September amid bullish momentum, following a short-term pause at $25.
data.description: According to recent analysis, the price prediction for AVAX indicates a potential increase to $32 within the next month. This projection is supported by strong bullish indicators in the market, despite a period of consolidation around $25.
